title: oberonia rubra
intro: Oberonia rubra, also known as the Red Oberonia orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oberonia rubra include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in the form of powders and capsules.
